mapper.select: SELECT m1.* FROM message m1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN from_user_id = #{userId} THEN to_user_id ELSE from_user_id END AS other_user_id, MAX(create_time) AS max_time FROM message WHERE from_user_id = #{userId} OR to_user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY other_user_id ) m2 ON ( (m1.from_user_id = #{userId} AND m1.to_user_id = m2.other_user_id) OR (m1.to_user_id = #{userId} AND m1.from_user_id = m2.other_user_id) ) AND m1.create_time = m2.max_time ORDER BY m1.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM message WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId} AND to_user_id = #{friendId}) OR (from_user_id = #{friendId} AND to_user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE from_user_id = #{friendId} AND to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
